{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":743},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7583014075513848638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真心不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765560765,"group_id":"7571050635085237273","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3413356176223555"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571050635085237273","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"94"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16184,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7581693543982187326","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还是不错的。比那些为了从新追回妻儿还故意隐瞒自己是富豪。美约其名是怕妻女一开始接受不了自己富豪的脑残小说好看多了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765253133,"group_id":"7571050635085237273","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+5RT1866z3PzRMVnA2wdV4lV8InbQRtArDP6oHtzqVe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3413356176223555","user_name":"众说纷纭的沈君山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3413356176223555","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664434426,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571050635085237273","book_info":{"abstract":"浪荡半生的林旭成为顶级神豪后，意外遇到素未谋面的女儿。
经过调查得知。
前女友至今未婚，还给他生下了一对龙凤胎。
可当初将前女友伤得太深，如今想要挽回困难重重。
要抹平前女友心里的伤疤；
要解开儿女心里的怨恨。
为了弥补当初所犯下的过错，林旭披荆斩棘，排除万难。
最终全家团圆，过上了幸福的生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5cb747ead7d97574b3d31b2ebe85abcc","author":"三月起源","author_id":"","book_id":"7571050635085237273","book_name":"刚上大学，蹦出个神豪老爸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#485050","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571053429754184217","read_count":"104345","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"455261"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"215","tags":"都市日常,都市,神豪","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/ce8b8b19080e58d7f43cd41826c1db0c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397187&x-signature=WvQU4JNhygQrOPaTGKHR5b%2B575A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105118532109","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":48,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13644,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":42906},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595233460111541017","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是学的不错的。不是那种常见的俗套路。写的比较合乎逻辑，合乎现实。
而且作者的三观还有这个成熟度都还不错。。
希望继续写下去。
有1000多人催更呢。

然后给作者一个建议，即使把主角写完了写到死了，其实也可以开一个续集去写他的儿女写之后的故事。。
这样的故事跟其他的小说完全不同。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768407270,"group_id":"7571050635085237273","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw25ARnpXr+rd6KILc3MkQI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9c3910f8e554fc8a15b89ce77ac428a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793664&x-signature=EyspZkxiK%2Fdxrc7o4Jxz8c30kLo%3D","user_id":"60161103178","user_name":"君思无邪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"60161103178","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571050635085237273","book_info":{"abstract":"浪荡半生的林旭成为顶级神豪后，意外遇到素未谋面的女儿。
